jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group!
